name: Sega Master System
description: Sega's 8-bit home console platform, known for arcade-style games, strong European and Brazilian presence, and early Sega franchise entries.

eras.title: Arcade Conversion Era
eras.description: Early period focused on Sega arcade conversions and establishing an 8-bit home platform.

eras.title: European Strength Era
eras.description: The Master System finds its strongest identity through Europe, Brazil, and platform/adventure games.

eras.title: Late Regional Era
eras.description: Later regional support, especially in Europe and Brazil, alongside the Mega Drive.
